---
title: "Getting Started with crane"
---
## Overview

`crane` provides tools for clinical reporting and analysis in R.

## Installation

```{r}
#| eval: false
# Install from GitHub or CRAN as applicable
# install.packages("crane")
```

## Basic Usage

```{r}
#| eval: false
library(crane)

# Add your crane experiments here
```

## Resources

- [Pharmaverse](https://pharmaverse.org/)

## Experiments

*Add your experiments here...*
